landing.heroTitle.en: Not sure if e-invoicing applies to you? Start here.
landing.heroTitle.ms: Tidak pasti jika e-invois terpakai kepada anda? Mula di sini.
landing.heroTitle.zh: 不确定电子发票是否适用于您？从这里开始。

landing.heroSubtitle.en: Malaysian e-invoice made easy - snap, speak, submit.
landing.heroSubtitle.ms: E-invois Malaysia dipermudahkan - snap, sebut, hantar.
landing.heroSubtitle.zh: 马来西亚电子发票，简单易用 - 拍照、说话、提交。

landing.feature1Title.zh: 隐私优先 & 本地优先

landing.feature1Desc.en: Your invoice data never leaves your device unless you choose Drive backup.
landing.feature1Desc.ms: Data invois anda tidak meninggalkan peranti anda melainkan anda memilih sandaran Drive.
landing.feature1Desc.zh: 您的发票数据不会离开设备，除非您选择云端备份。

landing.feature2Desc.en: Full UBL 2.1 JSON format with QR code as required by IRBM.
landing.feature2Desc.ms: Format JSON UBL 2.1 penuh dengan kod QR seperti dikehendaki oleh LHDNM.
landing.feature2Desc.zh: 完整的 UBL 2.1 JSON 格式及 QR 码，符合 IRBM 要求。

landing.feature3Desc.en: Free to use. No subscriptions, no hidden fees.
landing.feature3Desc.ms: Percuma untuk digunakan. Tiada langganan, tiada yuran tersembunyi.
landing.feature3Desc.zh: 免费使用。无订阅，无隐藏费用。

landing.painTitle.en: One path is painful. One is not.
landing.painTitle.ms: Satu jalan menyakitkan. Satu lagi tidak.
landing.painTitle.zh: 一条路很痛苦。另一条不是。

landing.portalItem1.en: ≈2000 classification codes to manually choose from
landing.portalItem1.ms: ≈2000 kod klasifikasi untuk dipilih secara manual
landing.portalItem1.zh: ≈2000 个分类代码需手动选择

landing.portalItem2.en: 5-step wizard with multiple screens per invoice
landing.portalItem2.ms: Wizard 5 langkah dengan pelbagai skrin setiap invois
landing.portalItem2.zh: 每张发票需经过 5 步向导多屏操作

landing.senangItem1.en: Snap, voice, or manual input in seconds
landing.senangItem1.ms: Snap, suara, atau input manual dalam beberapa saat
landing.senangItem1.zh: 拍照、语音或手动输入，几秒完成

landing.senangItem2.ms: Pengelasan automatik AI memadankan item anda
landing.senangItem2.zh: AI 自动分类匹配您的项目

landing.senangItem4.zh: 即时生成 QR 码 + PDF

landing.readySubtitle.en: Join thousands of Malaysian businesses submitting e-invoices the easy way.
landing.readySubtitle.ms: Sertai ribuan perniagaan Malaysia yang menghantar e-invois dengan cara mudah.
landing.readySubtitle.zh: 加入成千上万家以简单方式提交电子发票的马来西亚企业。

landing.footerText.en: Local-first · Your data stays on your device
landing.footerText.ms: Setempat-dulu · Data anda kekal di peranti anda
landing.footerText.zh: 本地优先 · 您的数据保留在您的设备上

create.captureHint.en: Take a photo of your receipt

create.speakItemsHint.en: Say e.g. "2 nasi lemak at 5 ringgit each"
create.speakItemsHint.ms: Sebut cth. "2 nasi lemak pada 5 ringgit setiap satu"
create.speakItemsHint.zh: 例如说 "2份椰浆饭，每份5令吉"

dashboard.subtitle.zh: 马来西亚电子发票，简单易用

dashboard.noInvoicesDesc.en: Create your first e-invoice to see it here.
dashboard.noInvoicesDesc.ms: Cipta e-invois pertama anda untuk melihatnya di sini.
dashboard.noInvoicesDesc.zh: 创建您的第一张电子发票即可在此查看。

settings.llmKeysDesc.ms: Disimpan setempat. Keutamaan dari atas ke bawah.
settings.llmKeysDesc.zh: 本地存储。优先级从上到下。

settings.myinvoisCredsDesc.en: Your own ERP credentials. Stored only on this device
settings.myinvoisCredsDesc.ms: used to submit e-invoices as you.
settings.myinvoisCredsDesc.zh: Kelayakan ERP anda sendiri. Disimpan hanya pada peranti ini

settings.demoModeDesc.en: Show demo data bar at top of page
settings.demoModeDesc.ms: Papar bar data demo di bahagian atas halaman
settings.demoModeDesc.zh: 在页面顶部显示演示数据栏

settings.googleDriveSyncDesc.en: Back up your invoices to Google Drive.
settings.googleDriveSyncDesc.ms: Sandarkan invois anda ke Google Drive.
settings.googleDriveSyncDesc.zh: 将您的发票备份到 Google Drive。

profile.subtitle.zh: 您的电子发票企业详情

profile.couldNotSave.en: Could not save profile. Please try again.
profile.couldNotSave.ms: Tidak dapat menyimpan profil. Sila cuba lagi.

invoice.notFoundDesc.en: This invoice may have been deleted or the link is invalid.
invoice.notFoundDesc.ms: Invois ini mungkin telah dipadam atau pautan tidak sah.
invoice.notFoundDesc.zh: 此发票可能已被删除或链接无效。

invoice.tinBuyerWarning.en: ⚠ General Public TIN requires consolidated invoice (code 004). Change classification or use a named buyer.
invoice.tinBuyerWarning.ms: ⚠ TIN Orang Awam memerlukan invois disatukan (kod 004). Tukar klasifikasi atau gunakan pembeli bernama.
invoice.tinBuyerWarning.zh: ⚠ 公众 TIN 需要合并发票（代码 004）。请更改分类或使用指定买家。

ask.subtitle.zh: 询问马来西亚电子发票相关问题

ask.placeholder.zh: 询问电子发票相关问题...

ask.scopeCheckDesc.en: Check if your business must comply with e-invoicing.
ask.scopeCheckDesc.ms: Semak jika perniagaan anda mesti mematuhi e-invois.
ask.scopeCheckDesc.zh: 检查您的企业是否必须遵守电子发票规定。

ask.corporateGroupLabel.en: Part of a corporate group with RM1m+ combined turnover
ask.corporateGroupLabel.ms: Sebahagian daripada kumpulan korporat dengan pusing ganti gabungan RM1j+
ask.corporateGroupLabel.zh: 属于营业额合计超过 100 万令吉的企业集团

ask.suggested2.en: What is the consolidated invoice rule?

ask.suggested3.en: How do I correct an invoice?

ask.suggested4.en: What are the penalties for non-compliance?

errors.networkError.en: Network error. Please check your connection.
errors.networkError.ms: Ralat rangkaian. Sila semak sambungan anda.
errors.networkError.zh: 网络错误。请检查您的连接。

errors.llmError.en: LLM request failed. Check your API key.
errors.llmError.ms: Permintaan LLM gagal. Semak kunci API anda.
errors.llmError.zh: LLM 请求失败。请检查您的 API 密钥。

errors.extractionError.en: Extraction failed. Try a clearer image or different input.
errors.extractionError.ms: Pengekstrakan gagal. Cuba imej yang lebih jelas atau input berbeza.
errors.extractionError.zh: 提取失败。请尝试更清晰的图像或其他输入。

errors.mappingError.en: Classification mapping failed. Please set codes manually.
errors.mappingError.ms: Pemetaan klasifikasi gagal. Sila tetapkan kod secara manual.
errors.mappingError.zh: 分类映射失败。请手动设置代码。

errors.submissionError.zh: 提交失败。请检查 MyInvois 凭证。

errors.sessionExpired.en: Session expired. Please sign in again.
errors.sessionExpired.ms: Sesi tamat. Sila daftar masuk semula.
errors.sessionExpired.zh: 会话已过期。请重新登录。

onboarding.welcomeDesc.en: Snap, speak, or type — get a MyInvois-ready e-invoice in seconds.
onboarding.welcomeDesc.ms: Imbas, sebut, atau taip — dapatkan e-invois sedia MyInvois dalam beberapa saat.
onboarding.welcomeDesc.zh: 拍照、语音或输入，几秒内生成符合 MyInvois 的电子发票。

onboarding.welcomeStep1.en: Capture by photo, voice, or manual entry
onboarding.welcomeStep1.ms: Tangkap melalui foto, suara, atau kemasukan manual
onboarding.welcomeStep1.zh: 通过照片、语音或手动输入

onboarding.welcomeStep3.en: Submit to MyInvois with one tap
onboarding.welcomeStep3.ms: Hantar ke MyInvois dengan satu ketikan

onboarding.scopeDesc.en: LHDN is rolling out e-invoicing in phases. Check whether it applies to you yet.
onboarding.scopeDesc.ms: LHDN melaksanakan e-invois secara berperingkat. Semak sama ada ia terpakai kepada anda.
onboarding.scopeDesc.zh: 内陆税收局正分阶段推行电子发票，查看是否已适用于您。

onboarding.driveDesc.en: Invoices are stored on your device and backed up to your own Google Drive.
onboarding.driveDesc.ms: Invois disimpan pada peranti anda dan disandarkan ke Google Drive anda sendiri.
onboarding.driveDesc.zh: 发票存储在您的设备上，并备份到您自己的 Google Drive。

demo.loaded.zh: 已加载 {n} 张示例发票

create.noItemsHint.en: Add items using Camera, Voice, or Manual entry below.
create.noItemsHint.ms: Tambah item guna Kamera, Suara, atau entri Manual di bawah.
create.noItemsHint.zh: 使用下方的相机、语音或手动输入添加项目。

landing.heroDescription.en: Snap a receipt, speak your items, or type them in. Senang Inv handles LHDN MyInvois submission, classification codes, QR codes, and PDF generation — so you don't have to.
landing.heroDescription.ms: Gambar resit, sebut item anda, atau taip. Senang Inv uruskan penyerahan MyInvois LHDN, kod klasifikasi, kod QR, dan penjanaan PDF — supaya anda tidak perlu.
landing.heroDescription.zh: 拍照收据、说出项目或手动输入。Senang Inv 为您处理 LHDN MyInvois 提交、分类代码、二维码和 PDF 生成。

invoice.confirmHardDeleteMsg.en: This permanently removes {number}. This cannot be undone.
invoice.confirmHardDeleteMsg.ms: Ini akan memadam {number} secara kekal. Tindakan ini tidak boleh dibatalkan.
invoice.confirmHardDeleteMsg.zh: 这将永久删除 {number}，无法撤销。

invoice.confirmDeleteMsg.en: Move {number} to trash? It can be restored within 30 days.
invoice.confirmDeleteMsg.ms: Alihkan {number} ke tong sampah? Ia boleh dipulihkan dalam masa 30 hari.
invoice.confirmDeleteMsg.zh: 将 {number} 移至回收站？30 天内可恢复。

invoice.editedWarning.en: You're editing a validated invoice. The MyInvois record won't change. For official corrections, issue a credit/debit note.
invoice.editedWarning.ms: Anda sedang menyunting invois yang telah disahkan. Rekod MyInvois tidak akan berubah. Untuk pembetulan rasmi, keluarkan nota kredit/debit.
invoice.editedWarning.zh: 您正在编辑已验证的发票。MyInvois 记录不会更改。如需正式更正，请开具贷方/借方票据。

voice.speechTimeout.en: Speech timeout — tap and speak again.
voice.speechTimeout.ms: Suara tamat masa — ketik dan cuba lagi.
voice.speechTimeout.zh: 语音超时——点击并重新说话。

voice.tooLong.en: Voice took too long — tap and speak again.
voice.tooLong.ms: Suara terlalu lama — ketik dan cuba lagi.
voice.tooLong.zh: 语音过长——点击并重新说话。

voice.error.zh: 语音错误。请尝试手动输入。

about.intro.en: Senang Inv helps Malaysian businesses comply with e-invoicing mandates easily and privately.
about.intro.ms: Senang Inv membantu perniagaan Malaysia mematuhi mandat e-invois dengan mudah dan peribadi.
about.intro.zh: Senang Inv 帮助马来西亚企业轻松私密地遵守电子发票规定。

about.missionDesc.en: We believe e-invoicing compliance should be simple, fast, and accessible to every Malaysian business. Your data stays on your device — private, secure, and always under your control.
about.missionDesc.ms: Kami percaya pematuhan e-invois sepatutnya mudah, pantas, dan boleh diakses oleh setiap perniagaan Malaysia. Data anda kekal pada peranti anda — peribadi, selamat, dan sentiasa di bawah kawalan anda.
about.missionDesc.zh: 我们相信电子发票合规应该简单、快速且适用于每个马来西亚企业。您的数据保留在设备上——私密、安全，始终由您掌控。

about.privacyDesc.en: Your invoice data never leaves your device unless you choose to back it up to your own Google Drive. No servers, no middlemen, no data harvesting.
about.privacyDesc.ms: Data invois anda tidak meninggalkan peranti anda melainkan anda memilih untuk menyandarkannya ke Google Drive anda sendiri. Tiada pelayan, tiada perantara, tiada pengumpulan data.
about.privacyDesc.zh: 除非您选择备份到自己的 Google Drive，否则您的发票数据不会离开设备。无服务器、无中间人、无数据收集。

about.contactDesc.en: Have questions? Send us a message.
about.contactDesc.ms: Ada soalan? Hantar mesej kepada kami.

about.formSuccess.en: Message sent! We'll get back to you soon.
about.formSuccess.ms: Mesej dihantar! Kami akan membalas secepat mungkin.
about.formSuccess.zh: 消息已发送！我们会尽快回复。

about.formError.en: Failed to send. Please try again.

support.intro.en: Learn about Malaysian e-invoicing requirements and check if they apply to your business.
support.intro.ms: Ketahui tentang keperluan e-invois Malaysia dan semak sama ada ia terpakai kepada perniagaan anda.
support.intro.zh: 了解马来西亚电子发票要求，并检查是否适用于您的企业。

support.askDesc.en: Check whether e-invoicing applies to your business.
support.askDesc.ms: Semak sama ada e-invois terpakai kepada perniagaan anda.
support.askDesc.zh: 检查电子发票是否适用于您的企业。

support.guideHint.en: Or browse our guide articles below.
support.guideHint.ms: Atau layari artikel panduan kami di bawah.
support.guideHint.zh: 或浏览下方的指南文章。

calc.subtitle.en: Enter your average sales to check whether you meet the RM1

calc.revenueHint.en: Enter your average revenue per period. We'll annualise it and compare against the RM1

calc.requiredDetail.en: Your annualised revenue exceeds the RM1

calc.exemptDetail.en: Your annualised revenue is {amount} below the RM1

calc.disclaimer.en: This calculator provides an estimate only. Official determination may depend on additional factors.
calc.disclaimer.ms: Kalkulator ini memberikan anggaran sahaja. Penentuan rasmi mungkin bergantung pada faktor tambahan.
calc.disclaimer.zh: 此计算器仅提供估算。官方判定可能取决于其他因素。
